name: Miglior Dog Multipack of Assorted Trays 150g x4
shortDescription: Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your dog, including vitamins, Omega 3, calcium and phosphorous to support strong bones and teeth, healthy skin and glossy coat, and toned musculature. What's in the box? 2 Beef and Heart Pate 2 Chicken and Turkey Pate
description: Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your dog. Vitamin E with antioxidant action and a recipe rich in meat to help keep muscle mass toned. NUTRITIONAL CHARACTERISTICS COMPOSITION: Patè with beef and heart: meat and animal derivatives 50% (beef 5%, heart 5%), minerals. Patè with chicken and turkey: meat and animal derivatives 50% (chicken 5%, turkey 5%), minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 81%, Crude protein 9.8%, Crude fat 6%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude ash 1.8%. ADDITIVES: Nutritional additives/kg: Vitamin E 7.5 mg, Zinc (Zinc sulphate monohydrate) 5.0 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 0.2 mg, Manganese (Manganous sulphate monohydrate) 1.7 mg, Iodine (Potassium iodide) 0.7 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place. DAILY RECOMMENDED AMOUNT Ideal weight (kg) 3 5 10 15 Daily amount (g) 280 415 700 950
